subject: [PATCH 09/14] sunrpc: add netlink upcall for the auth.unix.gid cache

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the implementation of sunrpc_nl_unix_gid_get_reqs_dumpit() and suggested a different approach to handling pending requests.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the unix_gid (auth.unix.gid) cache in the sunrpc subsystem. It introduces a new attribute-set and operations to manage pending requests and responses, and wires up a callback to trigger multicast events on cache misses.
